creator: prj@rootwyrm.com
text:
Created attachment 214068
Update to 3.2.4, switch to GitHub

postfixadmin development has become quite active again, necessitating an update here. Particularly included between 3.2 and 3.2.4 are fixes for SQLite and MySQL SSL connections. Active development and releases have also moved to GitHub from SourceForge.

Attached patch updates to 3.2.4 and switches to GitHub.
